title: persica davidiana var. rubra
intro: Persica davidiana var. rubra, also known as the Chinese red peach, is a variety of the Persica davidiana plant, a species of peach tree native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Persica davidiana var. rubra include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, coughs, and digestive issues.
